prestazioni: Engine: Koenigsegg 5.0L V8 twin-turbo (internal code: *Kappa V8*) upgraded with forged Mahle pistons (95.25mm bore, 10.5:1 CR) and Carrillo H-beam connecting rods for 1,300+ hp on E85 fuel, paired with a bespoke Weistec Engineering billet aluminum crankshaft (94mm stroke) and titanium intake valves from Del West.

Turbocharging: Dual Garrett GTX5544R Gen II turbos with 76mm compressor wheels, custom Koenigsegg-designed inconel turbine housings, and Tial MV-R 60mm wastegates, mated to a secondary intercooler system using PWR Australia heat exchangers and a secondary water-methanol injection (Snow Performance Stage 3) for charge cooling.

Drivetrain: Reinforced 7-speed Koenigsegg Light Speed Transmission (LST) with upgraded carbon-fiber clutch packs (Sachs Performance), a limited-slip differential with 45% lockup under load, and a custom Quaife ATB helical LSD for the rear axle, paired with a lightweight carbon-fiber propshaft from RCF Performance.
estetica: Aero: Full carbon-fiber Phoenix Edition-specific body kit by Koenigsegg Advanced Aerodynamics (KAA), including a revised front splitter with active Gurney flaps (adjustable via cockpit controls), a rear diffuser with integrated titanium strakes, and a fixed rear wing with dual-element active flaps (adjustable in 5-degree increments) for 1,200kg of downforce at 250 km/h.

Wheels: Custom forged aluminum center-lock wheels by Dymag (20x9.5 front, 21x12.5 rear) with bespoke Phoenix Edition gold-anodized accents, wrapped in Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 R tires (265/35 ZR20 front, 345/30 ZR21 rear) with custom Koenigsegg sidewall branding.

Interior: Full carbon-fiber weave interior with Phoenix Edition-specific gold stitching, including a bespoke steering wheel by MOMO (carbon-fiber with Alcantara grip and integrated paddle shifters), Recaro Pole Position seats with 6-point Schroth harnesses, and a custom titanium roll cage by Heigo (TIG-welded, 1.5mm wall thickness) with gold-plated fasteners.
